---
name: Teams
description: Pacific's internal delivery teams. Each team owns a practice area (data, strategy, ops) and the clients in that area are assigned to it.
---

# Teams

Three delivery teams today: **data** (analytics, data platforms, ML), **strategy** (market entry, growth, M&A advisory), **ops** (process improvement, supply chain). Cross-team work happens but is the exception, not the rule.
